close_reason: Replaced with individual extractor tasks: turnkey-7k8h (Rust), turnkey-uc52 (Python), turnkey-cevw (TypeScript), turnkey-20xv (Solidity)
description:
# Additional Language Extractors

Implement extractors for non-Go languages using native tooling.

## Extractors

| Language | Implementation | Tooling |
|----------|---------------|---------|
| Rust | Rust binary | `cargo_metadata` crate |
| Python | Python script | `ast` module |
| TypeScript | Node.js script | TypeScript compiler API |
| Solidity | Rust or JS | `solang-parser` or `solc` |

## Tasks

- [ ] Rust extractor using cargo_metadata
- [ ] Python extractor using ast module
- [ ] TypeScript extractor using TS compiler API
- [ ] Solidity extractor
- [ ] Integration tests for each extractor

## Notes

Each extractor should:
- Output the standard extraction protocol JSON
- Handle language-specific edge cases
- Be independently testable
title: Phase 5: Additional Language Extractors
